=== Dylan-1999-11-05-Pittsburgh_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
DAUD?
1999-11-05 
Civic Arena
Pittsburgh, PA

A very good sounding AUD (DAUD?), but there is crowd noise.
Review of the Show: http://my.execpc.com/~billp61/110599r.html


Sorry, no lineage available. 
Trade CDR > EAC > FLAC L5
Spectral View of Roving Gambler is included.

Disc 1:
01. Roving Gambler 	 
02. Love Minus Zero/No Limit 	 
03. Desolation Row 	 
04. Cocaine Blues 	 
05. Tangled Up in Blue 	 
06. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues 	 
07. Shelter from the Storm 	 
08. Tombstone Blues 	 

Disc 2:
01. Blind Willie McTell 	 
02. You Ain't Goin' Nowhere 	 
03. Highway 61 Revisited 	 
04. Love Sick 	 
05. Cat's in the Well 	 
06. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right 	 
07. Not Fade Away
